source: https://standards.iso.org/iso/17978/-3/ed-1/en/ISO%2017978-3%20ed.1%20-%20openapi-specification-1.1.0-rc1.zip
title: ISO 17978-3 ed. 1 - SOVD OpenAPI specification template (v1.1.0-rc1)
downloaded: 2026-04-14
covers: **CORE FIND.** The ISO 17978-3 official OpenAPI YAML template for the full SOVD API surface — 22 resource directories: authentication, bulkdata, capability-description, clear-data, commons, communication-logs, configurations, cyclic-subscriptions, data, discovery, faults, locks, logs, meta-schema, modes, operations, restarting, software-updates, triggers. Plus authentication-api.yaml top-level. This is the *template* per its README — server vendors are expected to derive a server-specific capability description from it and use that for code generation.
license: Each YAML inside the archive declares: "© by ASAM e.V., 2025 ... Any use is limited to the scope described in the ASAM license terms. See http://www.asam.net/license.html". The archive is distributed via the ISO Standards Maintenance Portal (standards.iso.org), subject to the "ISO Customer Licence Agreement" (https://www.iso.org/terms-conditions-licence-agreement.html#Customer-Licence). Treat as ASAM-copyrighted reference material: use for internal validation against our implementation, but do NOT redistribute, do NOT vendor the YAMLs into shipped source, and do NOT generate Apache-2.0-licensed code from them without legal review (per ASAM license terms).
